title: mount: output it before replacing lastError
body:
The same error was found in [#825 discussion](https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/825#discussion_r198082771). Fix it.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 4a3ae66 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 4a3ae66f488124e3759ffe0ac5c5ccb4db571227 -->
Homu does not like us.  @jlebon Any idea why?

Looks like the tests are failing:

```
run.go:848::warning: cyclomatic complexity 41 of function (*Builder).Run() is high (> 40) (gocyclo)
make: *** [Makefile:51: validate] Error 1
```
The comment that @rh-atomic-bot posts when tests fail on merge contain a link to the test results.
